_publications._publicationTitle: Cell of origin and microenvironment contribution for NF1-associated dermal neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: When SKPs derived from these mice were X-gal stained following a 48 hour exposure to 1 μM 4-hydroxy tamoxifen, they all turned blue
details: 4-hydroxy tamoxifen at 1 μM for 48 hours induced 100% recombination in SKPs, with all cells turning blue in X-gal staining
